org.apache.dubbo.remoting.p2p

接口 Group

  • 所有已知子接口:
    ExchangeGroup
    所有已知实现类:
    AbstractExchangeGroup, AbstractGroup, FileExchangeGroup, FileGroup, MulticastExchangeGroup, MulticastGroup

    public interface Group
    Group. (SPI, Prototype, ThreadSafe)

    Peer-to-peer

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      void close()
      close the group.
      URL getUrl()
      get group url.
      Peer join(URL url, ChannelHandler handler)
      join.
      void leave(URL url)
      leave.
